text: Morning Jarvis, help me plan my day. What's on the calendar?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Thursday, February 20. You have sprint planning at 10 AM, and pediatrician checkup for Lily.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Just wanted to mention that we brought our new golden retriever puppy, Cooper, home today. She was throwing broccoli on the floor demanding fruit snacks. Hope tomorrow is a bit easier.
title: Parenting Update

text: Logged that. Toddlers are full of energy. Toddler nutrition is a constant negotiation. Blending veggies into sauce works well. Rest well tonight.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick log: Helping Ethan with his homework tonight. He is studying hard for the school spelling bee tomorrow. I'm proud of his curiosity.
title: Kids School Update

text: Logged that. That's wonderful. Spelling bees build great vocabulary. I can quiz him on the word list if he wants. I can quiz him whenever he is ready.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Quick update: Went for a run around the neighborhood. I ran 5 miles but my knee felt tight. Will keep monitoring the metrics.
title: Health Update

text: Understood. Sleep quality is so important. Great run! Remember to stretch your hamstrings to help the knee. Keep stretching that knee!
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Sarah and I are looking at home listings in Frisco online. Researching the tax benefits of the Texas 529 plan. Need to make a final decision soon.
title: Finance Update

text: Smart financial planning. 529 plans offer great tax-free growth. I've archived the plan details. I've saved the 529 details.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Just wanted to mention that anika and I were mapping out the sprint goals. We are hitting major bottleneck issues with /sms/send under load. We need to get this sorted before the Baylor pilot starts.
title: Work Update

text: Got it, Mike. Got it, Mike. We should implement a connection pool or check the indexing on the underlying tables for /sms/send. I'll keep tracking the API performance.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Just wanted to mention that anika and I were mapping out the sprint goals. We got beta feedback from clinics suggesting they need scheduling portal immediately. Hopefully we can align on this during the stakeholder review.
title: Work Update

text: Logged that. Here is what I recommend. We should prioritize these clinic requests. Let's create a dedicated sub-task in the CareConnect backlog. I'll save this reasoning in our engineering scratchpad.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Modified the smart-home alert integrations. Scraping astrophotography files from Hubble. Love going down these rabbit holes.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Your hyperfocus projects are impressive. Hubble raw FITS files are great. I'll track the download folder sync. Let me know if you want to run testing scripts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Bedtime went very smoothly tonight. She was throwing broccoli on the floor demanding fruit snacks. We need to stay consistent with them.
title: Parenting Update

text: Logged that. Good planning. Toddler nutrition is a constant negotiation. Blending veggies into sauce works well. I've updated the grocery list.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick log: Ethan is working on a school assignment at the table. Mrs. Patterson says he is reading at a 3rd grade advanced grade level now. He is really putting in the effort.
title: Kids School Update

text: Interesting. That's wonderful. That's fantastic. We should continue his daily reading routine to support his growth. Let me know if he needs any more help.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Just wanted to mention that reviewing my sleep tracker logs. The pediatrician says Lily is growing on track. Hope the allergies calm down.
title: Health Update

text: Understood. Great consistency with running. Excellent news. The pediatric report is saved in Lily's folder. I'll save the mileage logs.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Quick update: Looking over our mortgage options. We are comparing school districts in Frisco to find the best neighborhood. Will talk this over with Sarah.
title: Finance Update

text: Sure thing! Smart financial planning. Liberty Elementary has excellent reviews. The neighborhood near it is highly recommended. I've saved the 529 details.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Just wanted to mention that greg is asking for updates on the latest pilot run. Anika Patel did a deep competitor analysis showing MyChart has billing integration. I want to make sure the team doesn't burn out.
title: Work Update

text: Sure thing! Here is what I recommend. This competitor data is a powerful lever. You can use it to justify keeping billing integration in the MVP. I'll save this reasoning in our engineering scratchpad.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Just wanted to mention that greg is asking for updates on the latest pilot run. Greg Holloway wants to drop secure messaging to save time, but Anika thinks it is essential. Greg is not going to like this, but we have to push back.
title: Work Update

text: I've noted that. I suggest a phased rollout. Shipping a basic version of secure messaging now and iterating later is a good compromise. I can prep some talking points for your meeting with Anika.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Jarvis, Researching rover power systems in depth. Lights will pulse red for X-class solar flares. Lost track of time, it's 2 AM now.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Logged that. That is a clean implementation. Connected NOAA weather APIs to your lights. Neat space coding hack, Mike! I've saved your custom configurations.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Quick journal entry for tonight. Made good progress on my work tasks today. Got document checklists ready for the mortgage refinance. CareConnect prep is moving along. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Logged that for you. See you in the morning, Mike.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
